underlying_goal: Get information about board games (Wingspan publisher's games, Civ5 strategy guide, BGG collection count)
friction_detail: BGG API consistently returned 401 errors across all endpoints, blocking 2 of 3 user requests despite multiple retries and reconnections.
brief_summary: User wanted board game info from BGG and a Civ5 strategy guide; the Civ5 guide was written successfully but BGG API failures blocked the other two requests.
